evals.prompt: Give me a quick review of my CV targeted at this Product Lead JD.
evals.expected_output: Finds or uploads CV, confirms 10 credit cost, runs ceevee_full_review with jd_text, presents positioning and edits summary.

assertions.name: handles_cv
assertions.description: Uploads CV or finds existing version

assertions.name: summarizes_results
assertions.description: Presents positioning and edits as concise summaries
